title: Ukraine immigration measures: Sign up for email updates - Canada.ca
content:
## Ukraine immigration measures: Sign up for email updates
Enter  your information below to get the latest updates on
- immigration programs
- priority processing to help affected people and
- other information about the Russian invasion of Ukraine
You’ll get information as it becomes available. You can unsubscribe at any time.

## Please take a few moments to rate your experience with this page.
